raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is fully reachable by the right arm; no objects obstruct the side approach and the cup’s 5 cm width is within claw limits.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and lifted off the tabletop, freeing the area in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "On the table, front-right area (right of box_2)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup; the front-right region of the tabletop is clear of obstacles and provides at least a 6 cm × 6 cm footprint.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup rests on the specified table area, safely out of the robot’s manipulation corridor in front of the boxes, and is released by the right arm."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_1 is fully exposed; the cup has been relocated; there is at least 40 cm of unobstructed frontal space for both arms to advance and establish broad palm contact on the front–bottom edge of the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly held by both manipulators, lifted several centimeters above the tabletop, completing the ‘pick-up’ task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is fully reachable by the right arm; no objects obstruct the side approach and the cup’s 5 cm width is within claw limits.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and lifted off the tabletop, freeing the area in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Target: On the table, front-right area (right of box_2)
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup; the front-right region of the tabletop is clear of obstacles and provides at least a 6 cm × 6 cm footprint.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup rests on the specified table area, safely out of the robot’s manipulation corridor in front of the boxes, and is released by the right arm.

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_1 is fully exposed; the cup has been relocated; there is at least 40 cm of unobstructed frontal space for both arms to advance and establish broad palm contact on the front–bottom edge of the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly held by both manipulators, lifted several centimeters above the tabletop, completing the ‘pick-up’ task.
